title: VanillaPLUUUS
description: A slightly modded modpack to keep the vanilla feeling. With Create.
body:
This modpack feels like vanilla with all of the Minecraft mechanics enhanced such as the Nether with **Better Nether**, the End with **Better End**, the villages with **CTOV**, the food with Farmer's Delight etc and much much more !

A beautiful overworld awaits you as well thanks to **CTOV** and it's addons with **Terralith**.

It is designed to be a lightweight modpack as I tried to remove most of the mods that weren't "Vanilla friendly" enough or not THAT useful to add.

The modpack runs on Fabric so most of the potato computers can run it.

Im planning to :
- Add quests
- Tweak default options
- Tweak some Client mods config like Jade, Xaero's minimap..
- Maybe add a default ressource pack
